case_title: ANDRE PHAM VS. TESFAYE MEKONNEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,887.54 FILED BY PHAM, ANDRE AS TO DEFENDANT MEKONNEN, TESFAYE LUXOR CABS, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S CROSS COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT DEFENDANT'S REQUEST', PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85.00 SERVED SEP-15-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MEKONNEN, TESFAYE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-09-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THEIR CASE TODAY. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

LUXOR MIGHT FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINANT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY RICK LARSEN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
